status.description: ALERT when any required field cannot be determined without guessing; otherwise OK.

total.description: The final amount paid or charged, formatted with exactly two decimal places. Null when unavailable, ambiguous, or not uniquely calculable.

total_source.description: Whether the total was visibly printed, calculated exactly from fully legible values, or unavailable.

date.description: The actual purchase, transaction, sale, payment, or check date formatted as MM/DD/YY. Null when missing, obscured, ambiguous, or unsupported.

vendor.description: The person or business that received the payment. State of the Arc Electric must never be returned as the vendor.

category.description: The expense category. Null when it cannot be determined from visible evidence.

description.description: A brief description of the visibly supported purchase, payment, product, or service.

alert_message.description: When status is ALERT, begins with *ALERT* and explains which required fields could not be determined and why. Null when status is OK.

total.description: The exact visible total text, exact arithmetic used, or an explanation that the total is unavailable.

date.description: The exact visible date text and its label, or an explanation that the correct transaction date is unavailable.

vendor.description: The exact visible identifying text supporting the vendor, or an explanation that the vendor is unavailable.
